name: useAuthority
description: A hook for checking if user has required authority/permissions by comparing user roles against required roles.
usage_guidelines: Use for role-based access control in components.
Pass user's authority array and required authority array.
Returns true if user has at least one matching role.
Set emptyCheck to control behavior when arrays are empty.
Use for conditional rendering of protected features.

params.name: emptyCheck
params.description: If true, returns false when arrays are empty; if false, returns true.

return_value.description: True if user has at least one matching role, false otherwise.

Dont: Don't rely solely on client-side checks
